headline: Is Dover (DOV) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Pullback And DCF Upside Estimate
summary: If you are wondering whether Dover's current share price reflects its true worth, this article will walk through what the numbers are really saying about the stock today. Dover last closed at US$208.42, with returns of 6.5% year to date and 18.5% over 1 year. The 7 day and 30 day returns of 7.9% and 6.8% declines hint that the market has recently become a bit more cautious. Recent coverage around Dover has focused on its position in the capital goods space and how investors are reacting to...
